compressed_prompt: Compose two angry limericks on moms' struggle to get kids to do chores. Use no commas. Separate with six asterisks (******).
response:
Here are two angry limericks on the topic:

There once was a mom full of rage
Whose kids wouldn't clean up their cage
She screamed and she hollered
And stomped and she wallered
But the mess just grew worse with their age

******

A mother who'd finally had it
Watched her son leave his room like a rabbit
She yelled "Clean that floor!"
He ran out the door
Now chores are his permanent habit
